vllm.title: Fixing various issues of async servers
vllm.author: zhuohan123
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Completely fix #47
Specifically, the changes include

A benchmark script that starts multiple processes to query the webserver to test the serving throughput.
Fix the performance issue of the async server without ray.
Support aborting requests.

Remaining TODOs:

 Support aborting requests for OpenA

vllm.title: [Docs] Write the `Adding a New Model` section
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Closes #65
This PR adds the Adding a New Model section to the doc.
Because the process of adding a model is complex and highly depends on the model architecture, I only provided the high-level guidance. I think we can further improve this section later.

vllm.title: [PyPI] Packaging for PyPI distribution
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR enables packaging the library for PyPI distribution.
The instructions (or workflow) to upload the package to PyPI will be added in the next PR.
